race.comment: SMOKE 'N' DARTS (1) finished runner-up in all three starts and gives the impression he will handle the jump out to 1300m. Gets the gun run today and proven in all conditions. Looks to fins his race. LION HUNT (12) Palace Pier gelding from St Covet's Spirit on debut for the Widdup stable. Primed with the two trials and the cross-over nose band goes on. SHE CAN SALSA (10) resumes. Encouraging debut when she warmed up late to run third over 1300m at Hawkesbury last February. Wasn't pushed out when sixth in a 1000m Gosford trial. Bred to get through the conditions and must be kept safe. CAPTAIN PEACOCK (2) The Autumn Sun gelding from Munhro on debut for the Kerry Parker yard. Trained locally and has impressed in his last two trials. Worthy contender.
